completedItems: Weekly report export/share remains enabled and backed by saved report APIs.
Feedback details and structured attachment metadata/local-preview flows remain enabled and labelled as metadata-only MVP.
Teacher management CRUD/archive and child edit/archive/restore are covered by E10 acceptance tests.
Parent storybook page exposes local Markdown export and clipboard/local share actions.
Director single-assignment AI dispatch loop remains API-backed and batch/help items are documented as non-MVP disabled decisions.
Admin quality metrics now prefer real local aggregate API data before AI fallback.
remainingItems: feature:smoke still fails legacy D08 localStorage/provider expectation cases; E10 targeted acceptance passed.
Production object storage, public share links, PDF/social export, production DB/auth lifecycle, backend internal auth, and real vivo env smoke remain outside current MVP.
Batch dispatch, external BI, help documentation, and ambiguous child disambiguation picker remain product gaps.
cleanedUiOnly: Global notification, message, and search controls no longer show clickable no-op/toast-only behavior; they are explicit disabled controls with reasons.
Old hidden disabled upload block was removed from feedback composer.
Storybook local export/share controls were added as real MVP actions instead of absent visual-only buttons.
D07 stale tests were updated to stop expecting weekly report export/share and child archive to remain disabled.
cleanedMockOnly: Teacher voice upload/understand no longer returns mock success for audio-only ASR missing-env.
Python ASR mock provider no longer fabricates transcript text from file names.
Python OCR mock provider no longer fabricates binary OCR text from file names.
Director metrics prefer local aggregate API data instead of fixed AI/demo metrics.
cleanedFakeSuccess: ASR missing-env with no text fallback now returns provider_unavailable instead of 200 success.
Health file binary OCR fallback fails closed when provider is unavailable and no text material exists.
Teacher voice UI labels local text fallback separately from real ASR upload.
Streaming AI fallback no longer emits a mock completed final event; it emits provider_unavailable/error metadata.
providerRisksFixed: teacher-voice-upload and teacher-voice-understand routes use local provider contracts and fail closed on ASR provider_unavailable.
Parent storybook media cache now records owner child/storybook scope and rejects cross-child/ownerless media reads.
High-risk consultation provider trace now distinguishes real provider output from fallback output.
/api/ai provider-state evidence remains covered by product:ai and E10 provider missing-env acceptance.
voiceRisksFixed: Command bus recomputes requiredConfirmation server-side before execution.
Command bus sanitizes navigation targets and rejects external/API/unknown paths.
Forged parent write commands without confirmation are rejected and do not persist messages.
Director, teacher, and parent voice regression suites pass through E06 command bus and scope checks.
productDecisionsAdded: Soft archive/restore is the MVP replacement for hard delete.
Attachments are metadata-only plus local preview until object storage is introduced.
Storybook sharing/export is local clipboard/Markdown MVP; public links, PDF, and social share are deferred.
Teacher deactivation means business archive, not identity lifecycle deletion.
Ambiguous child voice commands fail closed instead of writing to a guessed child.
Assignment statuses are pending | in-progress | resolved with legacy alias compatibility.
Global notification/message/search are disabled with reasons until notification/message-center/search specs exist.

checks.featureSmoke: failed: npm run feature:smoke still has legacy D08 failures in communication-flow, director-summary, health-consultation, parent-features storybook seed, and teacher-records-persistence
checks.productVoice: passed: npm run product:voice (13 parser tests and 15 Playwright tests)
checks.productAi: passed: npm run product:ai (vivo chat/ocr/asr missing-env contract verified)

risks: Brain backend is not running in local checks, so some AI routes intentionally log proxy fallback/ECONNREFUSED while tests assert safe fallback behavior.
feature:smoke failures appear tied to legacy D08 localStorage and old provider expectations rather than the E10 acceptance path.
Without real vivo environment variables, only provider contract and missing-env behavior can be verified.
notes: E10 cleanup and targeted acceptance are implemented. Overall status is partial only because the required aggregate feature:smoke command is not fully green.
